name: Modal
description: Accessible dialog overlay with title, description, icon, and action buttons. Renders via portal with backdrop blur, keyboard dismiss, and focus management.

onClose.description: Called when the modal should close

icon.description: Leading icon element (defaults to box icon if title is present)

onPrimaryClick.description: Called when primary button is clicked

onSecondaryClick.description: Called when secondary button is clicked (defaults to onClose)

closeOnOverlay.description: Close when clicking the backdrop overlay

blur.description: Show backdrop blur effect on overlay

accessibility.focusManagement: Body scroll is locked when modal is open
accessibility.screenReaderNotes: Title and description linked via aria-labelledby and aria-describedby

commonMistakes.correction: Both open and onClose are required

examples.title: Basic Modal
examples.code:
<Modal
  open={isOpen}
  onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)}
  title="Confirm Action"
  description="Are you sure you want to continue?"
  primaryLabel="Confirm"
  onPrimaryClick={handleConfirm}
  secondaryLabel="Cancel"
/>

examples.title: Modal with Custom Content
examples.code:
setIsOpen(false)} title="Edit Profile" primaryLabel="Save Changes" onPrimaryClick={handleSave} secondaryLabel="Cancel" >
setName(e.target.value)} /> setEmail(e.target.value)} />

examples.title: Large Modal with Vertical Buttons
examples.code:
<Modal
  open={isOpen}
  onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)}
  size="lg"
  title="Choose a Plan"
  description="Select the plan that works best for you."
  footerOrientation="vertical"
  primaryLabel="Upgrade to Pro"
  onPrimaryClick={handleUpgrade}
  secondaryLabel="Stay on Free"
>
  {/* Plan comparison content */}
</Modal>

examples.title: Modal with Custom Icon
examples.code:
<Modal
  open={isOpen}
  onClose={() => setIsOpen(false)}
  title="Delete Item"
  description="This action cannot be undone."
  icon={<Icon name="trash" className="text-error-500" />}
  primaryLabel="Delete"
  onPrimaryClick={handleDelete}
  secondaryLabel="Cancel"
/>

examples.title: Prevent Overlay Close
examples.code:
setIsOpen(false)} title="Important" closeOnOverlay={false} closeOnEscape={false} showClose={false} primaryLabel="I Understand" onPrimaryClick={() => setIsOpen(false)} >

Please read this important notice carefully.
